home.description: Zavantazhuyte DXF-detali, pidgotuyte geometriyu ta perekhodte do robochoho prostoru dlya kontrolovanykh prokhodiv nestyngu i perehlyadu rezultativ.
workspace.description: 3-ekrannyi protses dlya zavantazhennya DXF, validatsii heometrii, nalashtuvannya materialu ta kontrolovanykh prokhodiv nestyngu.
workspace.backendConnectionFailed: Zbyi pidkliuchennya do backend. Zapustit API server i perevirte VITE_API_BASE_URL.
screen1.validationGateSubtitle: Natysnit Dali odyn raz. Nestora avtomatychno ochystyt i pereviryt zavantazhenu heometriyu.
screen1.summarySubtitle: Spysok zavantazhen, status failiv ta hotovnist do validatsii.
screen2.summarySubtitle: Stan materialu zberihaietsya pid chas perekhodiv Nazad i Dali.
screen2.navigationSubtitle: Povernitsya nazad bez vtraty failiv chy parametriv.
screen2.scaleWarning: Pidtverdte poperedzhennya pro masshtab pered perekhodom do Ekranu 3.
screen2.previousRun: Poperednii prokhid uzhe ye i dosi vidobrazhatymetsya na Ekrani 3.
screen3.runControlSubtitle: Zapustit potochnyi obmezhenyi prokhid nestyngu abo povtorit poperednii rezultat.
screen3.artifactsSubtitle: Stan eksportu vidobrazhayetsya yavno navit yakshcho backend shche ne stvoryv usi formaty.
screen3.batchOverviewSubtitle: Perehliad potechnoi metadata batch i vydymykh hrup zamovlen do abo pislia zapusku.
screen3.batchOverviewEmpty: Yavni zamovlennya shche ne pryznaacheno. Nepryznaacheni detali zalyshatsya u typovomu batch.
screen3.runSummarySubtitle: Vydymi syhnaly rezultatu dlya potochnoho abo ostannoho zavershenoho prokhodu.
artifacts.dxfUnavailable: Stan DXF eksportu nedostupnyi, doky ne zavantazheno metadani zadachi.
artifacts.pdfUnavailable: Stan PDF zvitu nedostupnyi, doky ne zavantazheno metadani zadachi.
artifacts.jsonAvailable: JSON rezultat hotovyi do zavantazhennya z potochnoi zadachi.
artifacts.jsonUnavailable: JSON rezultat bude nedostupnyi, doky zadacha ne zavershytsya.
upload.title: Zavantazhennya DXF
upload.subtitle: Importuite odyn abo kilka DXF-failiv ta vydiahnit zamknuti polihony dlya potochnoi zadachi nestyngu.
orderEditor.title: Pryznachyty zamovlennya vybranym detailiam
orderEditor.subtitle: Zastosuite odyn ID zamovlennya, nazvu ta priorytet odrazu do kilkokh vybranykh detaley.
orderEditor.actionHint: Vykorystovuite tse, shchob zgrupuvaty kilka zavantazhenykh detaley pid odnym zamovlennyam bez okremoho redahuvannya kozhnoyi.
orderEditor.noParts: Spershu aktivuite ta validuite detali, shchob vykorystaty pryznachennya zamovlennya batch.
nesting.title: Material ta Parametry
nesting.subtitle: Zadayte material, heometriyu lysta, polityku povorotu ta povedinku detaley pered perekhodom do ekranu zapusku.
nesting.materialHint: Obrity preset, zberezhit potochni znachennya yak vlasnyi material abo prodovzhte ruchne vvedennya.
nesting.productionIntent: Obrity vyrobnychyi namir dlya tsiiei zadachi.
nesting.groupedOrdersIncluded: Do tsoho batch bude vkliucheno {count} hrup zamovlen.
nesting.defaultBatchGrouping: Detali bez yavnoho zamovlennya zalyshayutsya v typovomu batch-hrupuvanni.
nesting.fillSheetHelp: Rozmishchuyte aktyvni detali, doky bilshe nichoho ne pomistytsya. Poznachte detal yak tilky dlya zapovnennya, shchob vykliuchyty inshi z tsoho prokhodu.
nesting.batchQuantityHelp: Kozhna aktyvna detal povynna maty zapytanu kilkist. Rezultat pokazhe rozmishchenu i zalyshkovu kilkist po kozhnii detali.
nesting.scaleAcknowledge: Ya rozumiyu poperedzhennya pro masshtab i vse odno khochu zapustyty nesting
nesting.cleanupRequired: Pered startom nestyngu cleanup musi zalyshyty khoche b odnu aktyvnu detal z korektnoiu heometriyeiu.
nesting.uploadFilesFirst: Spershu zavantazhte DXF-faily, shchob sformuvaty spysok detaley.
nesting.enterSheetParameters: Vvedit rozmir lysta ta parametry nestyngu.
nesting.backendPayloadHint: Odynytsi lysta, zazor / kerf, polityka povorotu ta tsil bezposeredno potrapliaiut u backend payload dlya zapuskiv Ekranu 3.
metrics.title: Metryky Resultatu
metrics.subtitle: Vykorystannya materialu ta rezultaty rozmishchennya.
metrics.empty: Zapustit uspishnu zadachu nestyngu, shchob pobachyty vykhid, vidkhody ta vykorystannya lysta.
metrics.economicsSubtitle: Vartist lystiv i otsinochnyi rozdil tsinnosti za potocnym rezultatom.
metrics.perPartTracking: Zapytana, rozmishchena ta zalyshkova kilkist vidstezhuyetsya dlya kozhnoi detali v mezhakh vsiiei zadachi.
metrics.mixedSheetResultSubtitle: U rezultati tsiiei zadachi bulo rozmishcheno {count} typiv detaley.
metrics.repeatedFillResultSubtitle: Backend prodovzhuvav rozmishchuvaty detali, doky ne zakinchylasya geometriya, yaka pomishchayetsya. Vsoho rozmishchen: {count}.
metrics.partialFitBatchResultSubtitle: Zalyshkovi kilkosti pokazani yavno, oskilky backend zupynyvsya lyshe koli bilshe zapytanykh detaley ne pomishchalosya na dostupni lysty.
job.title: Status Zadachi
job.subtitle: Vidstezhuyte aktyvnyi prokhid nestyngu.
job.backendUnavailable: Backend nedostupnyi. Perevirte API server i VITE_API_BASE_URL.
job.failed: Zadacha zavershylasya z pomylkoyu. Vypravte vkhidni dany i zapustit znovu.
job.improvedBy: Pokraschennya na {value}% porivnyano z poperednim prokhodom
viewer.title: Perehlyad Maketu
viewer.empty: Zavantazhte ta obrobit DXF, shchob pobachyty tut heometriyu.
empty.title: Peretvoryte DXF-heometriyu na nesting, hotovyi do vyrobnytstva.
empty.description: Importuite detali, perevirte heometriyu, zapuskayte realni zadachi nestyngu ta analizuyte vykorystannya materialu v odnomu robochomu prostori.
status.noMaterials: Zberezhenykh presetiv poky nemae. Vykorystayte ruchne vvedennya abo stvorit novi.
status.materialNameRequiredForPreset: Pered zberezhennyam presetu potribno vkazaty nazvu materialu.
status.rotationRequired: Krok povorotu povynen buty bilshym za 0.
status.enablePart: Pered zapuskom nestyngu uvimknit khoche b odnu detal.
status.validPolygonRequired: Khoche b odna aktyvna detal povynna maty korektnyi ochyshchenyi polihon.
status.batchQuantityRequired: Rezhym Batch Quantity vymagaye kilkist >= 1 dlya kozhnoi aktyvnoi detali.
status.uploadBeforeContinue: Pered prodovzhennyam zavantazhte khoche b odyn DXF-fail.
status.noFilesYet: U protses shche ne dodano zhodnoho failu.
status.someFilesFailed: Chastyna failiv ne importuvalasya. Vypravte spysok zavantazhen pered prodovzhennyam.
status.validating: Perevirka zavantazhenykh failiv ta ochyshchennya heometrii...
status.validationFailed: Validatsiya ne vdalsya. Perehlyante problemy z failamy nyzhche.
status.noNestablePolygons: Perevirka ne dala polihoniv, prydatnykh dlya nestyngu.
status.resolveErrors: Usunte vydileni problemy z parametramy pered perekhodom do Ekranu 3.
status.parametersPreserved: Parametry zberihayutsya pid chas perekhodu mizh ekranamy.
status.jobTimedOut: Zadacha vykonuvalasya zanadto dovho. Sprobuyte znovu abo perevirte backend worker.
status.fileImportNotFinished: Import failu ne buv uspishno zavershenyi.
status.importNoPolygons: Import ne stvoryv zhodnoho korektnoho polihonu.
status.cleanupLargestPolygon: Znaydeno kilka ochyshchenykh polihoniv. Nesting vykorystaye naibilshyi polihon z tsoho failu.
status.uploadStatusSuccess: Zavantazhennya uspishne. {count} failiv hotovi do validatsii.
status.uploadStatusFailed: Odne abo kilka zavantazhen ne vdalisya. Perehlyante spysok zavantazhenykh failiv.
status.uploadStatusInitial: Krok 1: obereit odyn abo kilka DXF-failiv, shchob pobuduvaty bahatodetalnu zadachu nestyngu.
status.cleanupStatusRunning: Dlya kozhnoyi zavantazhenoyi detali vykonuietsya ochyshchennya heometrii...
status.cleanupStatusComplete: Validatsiyu zaversheno. Heometriyu detali ochyshcheno i hotovo do nastupnoho ekranu.
status.nestingStatusFailed: Poperednya zadacha zavershylasya z pomylkoyu. Za potreby onovit vhidni dani ta zapustit znovu.
status.nestingStatusRepeat: Krok 6: zapustit shche odyn obmezhenyi prokhid optymizatsii, shchob sprobuvaly pokrashchyty potochnyi rezultat.
status.nestingStatusReady: Krok 6: perehlyante spysok detaley, obereit rezhym i zapustit nesting.
status.nestingStatusBlocked: Pered nestingom ochyshchennya maie buty uspishnym.
status.scaleWarningDetected: Vyznacheni vykhidni odynytsi: {units}. Naibilshyi rozmir importovanoi detali stanovyt {partExtent}, a naibilshyi rozmir lysta stanovyt {sheetExtent}. Spivvidnoshennya: {ratio}x. Zazvychai tse oznachaie, shcho odynytsi DXF ta odynytsi lysta ne zbigayutsya.
